message:
feat(core,fusion,embed): optimize rank-map computation, borrowed RRF scoring, and expand test coverage

Core:
- Optimize canonicalize Vec allocation with pre-sized capacity
- Add 40+ collector/telemetry tests: query sanitization edge cases,
  CPU percentage clamping, normalization, config boundaries, stream
  emitter drain/health/cursor, runtime metrics snapshots
- Expand host adapter and e2e artifact infrastructure
- Add tantivy wrapper durability additions

Fusion:
- Extract build_borrowed_rank_map() as public API for rank-map reuse
- Add compute_rank_changes_with_maps() and kendall_tau_with_refined_rank()
  to avoid redundant HashMap construction in scoring pipeline
- Optimize RRF with FusedHitScratch<'a> using borrowed doc_id references,
  deferring into_owned() until final output collection
- Use sort_unstable_by() for deterministic scoring (safe, reduces alloc)
- Apply precompute pattern in searcher: build rank maps once, pass to both
  rank-change and Kendall tau functions
- Add 40+ tests: rank-map construction, duplicate handling, first-occurrence
  semantics, deterministic shuffle equivalence across permutations
- Expand fusion interaction integration tests (+68 lines)

Embed:
- Optimize Vec allocation in batch embedding with pre-sized capacity
- Refactor model registry: extract has_onnx_file() helper, move test-only
  functions behind #[cfg(test)], add exhaustive 2^7 combinatorial
  file-presence equivalence tests validating refactoring correctness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
